name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: He dreamt an old dream, of three knights in white cloaks, and a tower long fallen, and Lyanna in her bed of blood.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard梦见三名white-cloaked knights、已倒塌的tower与血床上的Lyanna。
blocks.literary_note_zh: old dream说明这不是新信息的普通回忆，而是多年反复回返、仍未被整合的创伤场景；开篇只给意象，不给因果。
blocks.background_zh: **Tower of Joy：** 位于Dorne红色山地的一座塔，Rhaegar曾如此命名；本段只确认Lyanna、三名Kingsguard与Eddard旧日战斗在此相连。

blocks.original_text: In the dream his friends rode with him, as they had in life. Proud Martyn Cassel, Jory’s father; faithful Theo Wull; Ethan Glover, who had been Brandon’s squire; Ser Mark Ryswell, soft of speech and gentle of heart; the crannogman, Howland Reed; Lord Dustin on his great red stallion. Ned had known their faces as well as he knew his own once, but the years leech at a man’s memories, even those he has vowed never to forget. In the dream they were only shadows, grey wraiths on horses made of mist.
blocks.explanation_zh: 梦中六名旧友与他同行；岁月模糊他们的脸，使其成为雾马上的灰色幽灵。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 朋友的脸被years leech成shadows，敌方三人的脸反而清晰，说明创伤记忆并不按情感亲疏保存。
blocks.background_zh: **Eddard同行者：** Martyn Cassel、Theo Wull、Ethan Glover、Mark Ryswell、Howland Reed、Lord Dustin；梦中与Eddard合为七人。

blocks.original_text: They were seven, facing three. In the dream as it had been in life. Yet these were no ordinary three. They waited before the round tower, the red mountains of Dorne at their backs, their white cloaks blowing in the wind. And these were no shadows; their faces burned clear, even now. Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning, had a sad smile on his lips. The hilt of the greatsword Dawn poked up over his right shoulder. Ser Oswell Whent was on one knee, sharpening his blade with a whetstone. Across his white-enameled helm, the black bat of his House spread its wings. Between them stood fierce old Ser Gerold Hightower, the White Bull, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.
blocks.explanation_zh: 七人面对三名非凡Kingsguard：Arthur Dayne、Oswell Whent和Lord Commander Gerold Hightower。
blocks.literary_note_zh: seven against three在数量上占优，叙述却用非凡称号、武器和静定动作让三人更具压迫感。
blocks.background_zh: **三名Kingsguard：** Arthur Dayne号Sword of the Morning并持Dawn；Oswell Whent属black bat家族；Gerold Hightower是Lord Commander。

blocks.original_text: “I looked for you on the Trident,” Ned said to them.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说自己曾在Trident战场寻找他们。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 对话像仪式化问答，Eddard逐一列出Kingsguard本应出现的历史节点，实际在逼近‘为何守在这里’。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “We were not there,” Ser Gerold answered.
blocks.explanation_zh: Gerold说他们不在那里。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Woe to the Usurper if we had been,” said Ser Oswell.
blocks.explanation_zh: Oswell称若他们在场，Usurper必有灾祸。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Usurper是Targaryen loyalist对Robert的称呼；梦保留对手的价值语言，没有把胜者叙事强加给他们。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “When King’s Landing fell, Ser Jaime slew your king with a golden sword, and I wondered where you were.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard又问King’s Landing陷落、Jaime杀Aerys时他们在哪里。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: **历史节点：** Trident战役后Rhaegar死；King’s Landing陷落时Jaime杀Aerys。梦中三名Kingsguard均未出现在这些地点。

blocks.original_text: “Far away,” Ser Gerold said, “or Aerys would yet sit the Iron Throne, and our false brother would burn in seven hells.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Gerold说若他们在场，Aerys仍会在位，Jaime会受地狱惩罚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: false brother把Jaime定义为违誓者；这是Gerold立场，不等于文本已裁定所有历史复杂性。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I came down on Storm’s End to lift the siege,” Ned told them, “and the Lords Tyrell and Redwyne dipped their banners, and all their knights bent the knee to pledge us fealty. I was certain you would be among them.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard回忆解除Storm’s End围困、Tyrell与Redwyne投降时，也以为会见到他们。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: **Storm’s End：** Rebellion末期受Tyrell、Redwyne围困，Eddard南下解除围城并接受其投降。

blocks.original_text: “Our knees do not bend easily,” said Ser Arthur Dayne.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arthur说Kingsguard的膝盖不轻易弯曲。
blocks.literary_note_zh: knees do not bend既指不投降，也把Kingsguard vow写成身体姿态。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Ser Willem Darry is fled to Dragonstone, with your queen and Prince Viserys. I thought you might have sailed with him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard提到Willem Darry带queen与Viserys逃往Dragonstone，猜他们可能同行。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: **Dragonstone撤离：** Willem Darry曾带Aerys遗孀与年幼Viserys撤往Dragonstone；三名Kingsguard并未同行。

blocks.original_text: “Ser Willem is a good man and true,” said Ser Oswell.
blocks.explanation_zh: Oswell承认Willem忠诚可靠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “But not of the Kingsguard,” Ser Gerold pointed out. “The Kingsguard does not flee.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Gerold强调Willem并非Kingsguard，而Kingsguard不会逃。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 短句把‘不逃’绝对化；其光荣感与对局势变化的拒绝适应同时存在。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Then or now,” said Ser Arthur. He donned his helm.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arthur戴上helmet，说无论过去现在皆如此。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “We swore a vow,” explained old Ser Gerold.
blocks.explanation_zh: Gerold以他们发过vow解释坚守。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard重做Tower of Joy旧梦：七名同伴面对三名Kingsguard，战斗与Lyanna呼喊、blood、rose petals和promise相连。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Ned’s wraiths moved up beside him, with shadow swords in hand. They were seven against three.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard的六名幽灵同伴执shadow swords靠拢，恢复七对三阵势。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard同伴只剩wraiths和shadow swords，预先暗示这场胜利将伴随巨大死亡代价。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “And now it begins,” said Ser Arthur Dayne, the Sword of the Morning. He unsheathed Dawn and held it with both hands. The blade was pale as milkglass, alive with light.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arthur拔出发光的Dawn，说战斗现在开始。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dawn alive with light与其余shadow形成视觉对立，让Arthur在梦中近似不可战胜的传说人物。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Ned said with sadness in his voice. “Now it ends.” As they came together in a rush of steel and shadow, he could hear Lyanna screaming. “Eddard!” she called. A storm of rose petals blew across a blood-streaked sky, as blue as the eyes of death.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard悲伤地说现在是结束；钢铁交击时听见Lyanna尖叫呼唤他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Now it ends把Robert’s Rebellion的军事胜利与Eddard私人灾难叠在一起；rose petals、blood sky和blue eyes把美、死亡与Lyanna相连。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Lord Eddard,” Lyanna called again.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lyanna的呼唤在梦与现实间再次响起。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 称呼从Eddard到Lord Eddard悄然变化，梦中Lyanna的声音被现实男性声音接管。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I promise,” he whispered. “Lya, I promise . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard低声重复自己给Lyanna的promise。
blocks.literary_note_zh: promise被重复却不说明内容，是本章最明确的悬而未决信息；只能确认它长期支配Eddard的记忆。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实／未知：** Eddard确实向Lyanna作过promise；本章尚未说明承诺内容、起因或持续后果。

blocks.original_text: “Lord Eddard,” a man echoed from the dark.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黑暗里一个男人的声音接过Lord Eddard的呼唤。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Groaning, Eddard Stark opened his eyes. Moonlight streamed through the tall windows of the Tower of the Hand.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard醒来，发现自己在Tower of the Hand。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tower of the Hand与梦中fallen tower形成地点回声：他从一个权力与死亡之塔醒在另一个权力之塔。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Lord Eddard?” A shadow stood over the bed.
blocks.explanation_zh: 床边的shadow再次确认他是否清醒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “How . . . how long?” The sheets were tangled, his leg splinted and plastered. A dull throb of pain shot up his side.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard问过了多久，同时感到固定腿部的钝痛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: tangled sheets、splint与throb把传奇梦境突然压回脆弱身体。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Six days and seven nights.” The voice was Vayon Poole’s. The steward held a cup to Ned’s lips. “Drink, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Vayon Poole说他昏睡六天七夜并喂水。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: **伤势：** Jaime伏击后Eddard腿部骨折，服用milk of the poppy并昏睡六天七夜。

blocks.original_text: “What . . . ?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard迷糊地询问杯中是什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Only water. Maester Pycelle said you would be thirsty.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Poole说只是water，Pycelle预料他会口渴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Ned drank. His lips were parched and cracked. The water tasted sweet as honey.
blocks.explanation_zh: 嘴唇干裂的Eddard觉得水甜如honey。
blocks.literary_note_zh: water sweet as honey以极端口渴改变最普通事物的价值，展示昏迷后的身体尺度。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “The king left orders,” Vayon Poole told him when the cup was empty. “He would speak with you, my lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Poole转告king命令醒后立刻见面。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “On the morrow,” Ned said. “When I am stronger.” He could not face Robert now. The dream had left him weak as a kitten.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard因梦后虚弱，想推迟到明天。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他回避Robert不只是伤势；梦把旧友、Lyanna与promise重新带到当前政治冲突中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “My lord,” Poole said, “he commanded us to send you to him the moment you opened your eyes.” The steward busied himself lighting a bedside candle.
blocks.explanation_zh: Poole说明Robert明确命令他一醒就通报，随后点灯。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Ned cursed softly. Robert was never known for his patience. “Tell him I’m too weak to come to him. If he wishes to speak with me, I should be pleased to receive him here. I hope you wake him from a sound sleep. And summon . . . ” He was about to say Jory when he remembered. “Summon the captain of my guard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard让Robert若要谈就亲自来，还差点按习惯召Jory，想起死亡后改叫guard captain。
blocks.literary_note_zh: about to say Jory是丧失习惯的瞬间：语言比意识更慢接受长期依赖者已死。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Alyn stepped into the bedchamber a few moments after the steward had taken his leave. “My lord.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Alyn很快进入bedchamber听命。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Poole tells me it has been six days,” Ned said. “I must know how things stand.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard要他汇报昏迷六天间局势。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “The Kingslayer is fled the city,” Alyn told him. “The talk is he’s ridden back to Casterly Rock to join his father. The story of how Lady Catelyn took the Imp is on every lip. I have put on extra guards, if it please you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Alyn报告Jaime逃离城市、Catelyn捕Tyrion已传遍，并主动增加guards。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三条消息同时显示冲突扩散：Jaime军事移动传闻、Tyrion被捕成为公共故事、Stark household进入防御。
blocks.background_zh: **当前局势：** Catelyn带Tyrion前往Vale；Jaime在King’s Landing袭击Eddard后离城，去向只是流言。

blocks.original_text: “It does,” Ned assured him. “My daughters?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard认可并立刻问daughters。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “They have been with you every day, my lord. Sansa prays quietly, but Arya . . . ” He hesitated. “She has not said a word since they brought you back. She is a fierce little thing, my lord. I have never seen such anger in a girl.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Alyn说Sansa每日祈祷，Arya则愤怒沉默。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa以内向祈祷、Arya以沉默愤怒回应同一创伤，避免把child grief写成单一模板。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Whatever happens,” Ned said, “I want my daughters kept safe. I fear this is only the beginning.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard要求无论发生什么都保护daughters，认为冲突才刚开始。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “No harm will come to them, Lord Eddard,” Alyn said. “I stake my life on that.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Alyn以生命担保她们安全。
blocks.literary_note_zh: stake my life既是守卫誓言，也因Jory刚死亡而带有真实风险，不是空洞套语。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Jory and the others . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard转问Jory等死者。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I gave them over to the silent sisters, to be sent north to Winterfell. Jory would want to lie beside his grandfather.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Alyn已交给silent sisters送回Winterfell，让Jory葬在grandfather旁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 现实声音唤醒昏迷六天的Eddard；他得知Jaime离城、女儿悲痛、死者送北，并把Jory之死与旧日tower伤亡连接。
blocks.background_zh: **silent sisters：** 负责处理与运送遗体的宗教女性群体；Alyn安排Jory等返回Winterfell安葬。

blocks.original_text: It would have to be his grandfather, for Jory’s father was buried far to the south. Martyn Cassel had perished with the rest. Ned had pulled the tower down afterward, and used its bloody stones to build eight cairns upon the ridge. It was said that Rhaegar had named that place the tower of joy, but for Ned it was a bitter memory. They had been seven against three, yet only two had lived to ride away; Eddard Stark himself and the little crannogman, Howland Reed. He did not think it omened well that he should dream that dream again after so many years.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard想到Jory之父Martyn死在Tower of Joy；当年七对三仅Eddard与Howland Reed生还，他觉得旧梦重现不是吉兆。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jory遗体将靠近grandfather，却不能靠近father，使当下死亡与Tower of Joy旧死亡形成家族闭环。
blocks.background_zh: **已知幸存者：** Tower of Joy七名北方人中只有Eddard与Howland Reed活着离开；塔后被拆，石头建成八座cairns。

blocks.original_text: “You’ve done well, Alyn,” Ned was saying when Vayon Poole returned. The steward bowed low. “His Grace is without, my lord, and the queen with him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard刚肯定Alyn，Poole便报告Robert与Cersei已到门外。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Ned pushed himself up higher, wincing as his leg trembled with pain. He had not expected Cersei to come. It did not bode well that she had. “Send them in, and leave us. What we have to say should not go beyond these walls.” Poole withdrew quietly.
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei同行使Eddard警觉；他命其他人离开，让谈话不外传。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard要求密谈表明他仍想维护王室内部体面，但Cersei到场意味着谈话已是阵营对抗。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Robert had taken time to dress. He wore a black velvet doublet with the crowned stag of Baratheon worked upon the breast in golden thread, and a golden mantle with a cloak of black and gold squares. A flagon of wine was in his hand, his face already flushed from drink. Cersei Lannister entered behind him, a jeweled tiara in her hair.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert盛装、带wine且已脸红，Cersei戴tiara随后进入。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert精心穿戴王权标志，却又带酒、脸红；外部regalia与内部失控并置。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Your Grace,” Ned said. “Your pardons. I cannot rise.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard向king致礼并为无法起身致歉。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “No matter,” the king said gruffly. “Some wine? From the Arbor. A good vintage.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert不介意并递上Arbor wine。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “A small cup,” Ned said. “My head is still heavy from the milk of the poppy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard只要少量，说明milk of the poppy仍令头脑沉重。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: **milk of the poppy：** 强效止痛镇静药，会使意识沉重；Eddard此时并非完全恢复状态。

blocks.original_text: “A man in your place should count himself fortunate that his head is still on his shoulders,” the queen declared.
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei讽刺他应庆幸脑袋还在肩上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei第一句话把探病改成审讯威胁，迅速确定谈话基调。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Quiet, woman,” Robert snapped. He brought Ned a cup of wine. “Does the leg still pain you?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert粗暴让Cersei安静，亲自问Eddard腿伤。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Some,” Ned said. His head was swimming, but it would not do to admit to weakness in front of the queen.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard不愿在queen前示弱，只承认有些疼。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 不承认weakness是策略，却也使重伤、药物和愤怒影响下的决定不易被他自己纳入评估。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Pycelle swears it will heal clean.” Robert frowned. “I take it you know what Catelyn has done?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert说Pycelle保证会痊愈，转问他是否知道Catelyn行为。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I do.” Ned took a small swallow of wine. “My lady wife is blameless, Your Grace. All she did she did at my command.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard承认知情，并把Catelyn拘捕Tyrion的责任全部揽到自己命令上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard揽责是在保护Catelyn，也把她行动转化为Hand的正式行为，从而让Robert必须直接处理制度冲突。
blocks.background_zh: **责任声明：** Catelyn实际根据dagger线索临场拘捕Tyrion；Eddard在此对Robert声称她依自己命令行动。

blocks.original_text: “I am not pleased, Ned,” Robert grumbled.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert直言自己不高兴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “By what right do you dare lay hands on my blood?” Cersei demanded. “Who do you think you are?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei质问Eddard凭何动她的blood。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “The Hand of the King,” Ned told her with icy courtesy. “Charged by your own lord husband to keep the king’s peace and enforce the king’s justice.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard以Hand身份和维护king’s peace、执行king’s justice的职责回答。
blocks.literary_note_zh: icy courtesy以礼貌形式拒绝服从羞辱；他引用的不是私人报复，而是Robert亲授的official mandate。
blocks.background_zh: **Hand authority：** Hand受king委任执行政务与justice；Eddard先前因反对刺杀Daenerys辞职，Robert尚未接受永久离任。

blocks.original_text: “You were the Hand,” Cersei began, “but now—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei想说他已经不再是Hand。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Silence!” the king roared. “You asked him a question and he answered it.” Cersei subsided, cold with anger, and Robert turned back to Ned. “Keep the king’s peace, you say. Is this how you keep my peace, Ned? Seven men are dead . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert制止她，却也指责Eddard所谓维持和平已导致七人死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert关心结果性秩序：死了多少人、街道是否乱；Eddard关心原因性justice：谁先犯罪、如何问责。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Eight,” the queen corrected. “Tregar died this morning, of the blow Lord Stark gave him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei补充被Eddard击伤的Tregar今晨死亡，数字为八。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei精准更新死亡数字，既强化Stark责任，也表明她持续掌握Lannister伤亡。
blocks.background_zh: **死亡计数：** Stark一方Jory、Wyl、Heward三死；Lannister一方在街战后已有五死，包括Tregar。

blocks.original_text: “Abductions on the kingsroad and drunken slaughter in my streets,” the king said. “I will not have it, Ned.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert把kingsroad拘捕与街头械斗都视为自己不能容忍的秩序崩坏。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Catelyn had good reason for taking the Imp—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard试图解释Catelyn有充分理由。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert与Cersei来访，围绕Catelyn拘捕Tyrion和街头死亡争执；Eddard揽责，Robert只求立即释放与和解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I said, I will not have it! To hell with her reasons. You will command her to release the dwarf at once, and you will make your peace with Jaime.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert拒绝听理由，命他释放Tyrion并与Jaime和解。
blocks.literary_note_zh: to hell with her reasons公开切断事实调查；Robert追求快速停战，而非判断谁的指控成立。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Three of my men were butchered before my eyes, because Jaime Lannister wished to chasten me. Am I to forget that?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard反问自己是否应忘记Jaime为惩戒他而当面杀死三名手下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: chasten把杀人表述为对Eddard的惩戒，强调Jaime在用私兵替自己执行未经审判的权力。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “My brother was not the cause of this quarrel,” Cersei told the king. “Lord Stark was returning drunk from a brothel. His men attacked Jaime and his guards, even as his wife attacked Tyrion on the kingsroad.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei反转叙事，称Eddard醉离brothel后主动袭击Jaime，Catelyn也先袭Tyrion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei把前因删去，只留下brothel、drunk与双方主动攻击，展示政治叙事如何靠选择性事实重排责任。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “You know me better than that, Robert,” Ned said. “Ask Lord Baelish if you doubt me. He was there.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard请Robert去问现场的Littlefinger。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 双方争夺街头冲突叙事并牵出Barra；Eddard要求抓Jaime，Cersei刺激Robert，最终Robert当场殴打她。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I’ve talked to Littlefinger,” Robert said. “He claims he rode off to bring the gold cloaks before the fighting began, but he admits you were returning from some whorehouse.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert说Littlefinger只承认他们从whorehouse回来，称自己战前已离开找gold cloaks。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger的证词只覆盖自己离开前所见，既不能证明Jaime后续行为，也留下他为何恰好缺席的空白。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Some whorehouse? Damn your eyes, Robert, I went there to have a look at your daughter! Her mother has named her Barra. She looks like that first girl you fathered, when we were boys together in the Vale.” He watched the queen as he spoke; her face was a mask, still and pale, betraying nothing.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard愤怒揭示自己去看Robert的女儿Barra，并观察Cersei对私生女消息毫无表情。
blocks.literary_note_zh: your daughter既纠正brothel暗示，也故意在Cersei面前投放Robert私生子女信息；mask说明她不愿提供可读反应。
blocks.background_zh: **Barra：** Robert与一名约十五岁女孩所生的婴儿；Eddard此前调查Robert私生子女特征时见过她。

blocks.original_text: Robert flushed. “Barra,” he grumbled. “Is that supposed to please me? Damn the girl. I thought she had more sense.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert只抱怨Barra之母缺乏判断，不因女儿消息喜悦。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert把怀孕与爱恋责任推给十五岁女孩的sense，回避自己年龄、权力与承诺位置。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “She cannot be more than fifteen, and a whore, and you thought she had sense?” Ned said, incredulous. His leg was beginning to pain him sorely. It was hard to keep his temper. “The fool child is in love with you, Robert.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard指出母亲才约十五岁且处境脆弱，却爱上Robert。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard的incredulous突出道德尺度差异：Robert视为麻烦的女人，在他眼中是易受伤害的child。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: The king glanced at Cersei. “This is no fit subject for the queen’s ears.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert看向Cersei，说这话题不适合queen听。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 双方争夺街头冲突叙事并牵出Barra；Eddard要求抓Jaime，Cersei刺激Robert，最终Robert当场殴打她。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Her Grace will have no liking for anything I have to say,” Ned replied. “I am told the Kingslayer has fled the city. Give me leave to bring him back to justice.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说Cersei也不会喜欢接下来的要求：授权抓Jaime归案。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 双方争夺街头冲突叙事并牵出Barra；Eddard要求抓Jaime，Cersei刺激Robert，最终Robert当场殴打她。
blocks.background_zh: **Jaime状态：** 他已离开King’s Landing；Eddard要求正式授权追捕，Robert拒绝。

blocks.original_text: The king swirled the wine in his cup, brooding. He took a swallow. “No,” he said. “I want no more of this. Jaime slew three of your men, and you five of his. Now it ends.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert喝酒沉思后拒绝，按双方死亡人数宣布冲突到此结束。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三对五的死亡算术把justice缩成账面平衡，却忽略谁发动、谁逃逸以及死者个体。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Is that your notion of justice?” Ned flared. “If so, I am pleased that I am no longer your Hand.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard质疑这种算术是否算justice，并说庆幸自己不再是Hand。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard以不再任职保护道德一致性；但这也让他失去在制度内部继续调查与阻止伤害的工具。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: The queen looked to her husband. “If any man had dared speak to a Targaryen as he has spoken to you—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei用Targaryen kings不会容忍这种言辞来刺激Robert。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei引用Targaryen专制不是赞美，而是以‘你不像真正的king’触发Robert身份焦虑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Do you take me for Aerys?” Robert interrupted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert反问她是否把自己当Aerys。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 双方争夺街头冲突叙事并牵出Barra；Eddard要求抓Jaime，Cersei刺激Robert，最终Robert当场殴打她。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “I took you for a king. Jaime and Tyrion are your own brothers, by all the laws of marriage and the bonds we share. The Starks have driven off the one and seized the other. This man dishonors you with every breath he takes, and yet you stand there meekly, asking if his leg pains him and would he like some wine.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei称自己只把他当king，并说Starks攻击其姻亲、Eddard持续羞辱王权，而Robert却软弱关怀他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: marriage bonds把Jaime、Tyrion称为Robert brothers，使Lannister利益包装成王室honor。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Robert’s face was dark with anger. “How many times must I tell you to hold your tongue, woman?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert愤怒再次命Cersei闭嘴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 双方争夺街头冲突叙事并牵出Barra；Eddard要求抓Jaime，Cersei刺激Robert，最终Robert当场殴打她。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Cersei’s face was a study in contempt. “What a jape the gods have made of us two,” she said. “By all rights, you ought to be in skirts and me in mail.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei嘲讽两人性别角色倒置：Robert该穿裙、她该披甲。
blocks.literary_note_zh: skirts/mail羞辱依赖性别角色规范，把克制称作女性化、把攻击性称作统治资格。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Purple with rage, the king lashed out, a vicious backhand blow to the side of the head. She stumbled against the table and fell hard, yet Cersei Lannister did not cry out. Her slender fingers brushed her cheek, where the pale smooth skin was already reddening. On the morrow the bruise would cover half her face. “I shall wear this as a badge of honor,” she announced.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert反手打倒Cersei；她不哭喊，称脸上将形成的bruise是badge of honor。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 叙事清楚记录Robert主动施暴与严重后果；Cersei的挑衅不构成正当化，badge of honor则把伤痕转成控诉证据。
blocks.background_zh: **安全与责任：** 本段描写成人伴侣间的家庭暴力。Robert的行为由他本人实施；后文自责或指责Cersei均不改变这一事实。

blocks.original_text: “Wear it in silence, or I’ll honor you again,” Robert vowed. He shouted for a guard. Ser Meryn Trant stepped into the room, tall and somber in his white armor. “The queen is tired. See her to her bedchamber.” The knight helped Cersei to her feet and led her out without a word.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert威胁再打，叫Ser Meryn护送Cersei回房。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert一面命令沉默一面借Kingsguard执行隔离，王室制度在此保护施暴者免于继续面对受害者。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Robert reached for the flagon and refilled his cup. “You see what she does to me, Ned.” The king seated himself, cradling his wine cup. “My loving wife. The mother of my children.” The rage was gone from him now; in his eyes Ned saw something sad and scared. “I should not have hit her. That was not . . . that was not kingly.” He stared down at his hands, as if he did not quite know what they were. “I was always strong . . . no one could stand before me, no one. How do you fight someone if you can’t hit them?” Confused, the king shook his head. “Rhaegar . . . Rhaegar won, damn him. I killed him, Ned, I drove the spike right through that black armor into his black heart, and he died at my feet. They made up songs about it. Yet somehow he still won. He has Lyanna now, and I have her.” The king drained his cup.
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei离开后Robert把暴力归咎于她的挑衅，随后承认不该动手，并流露自己虽杀Rhaegar却仍失去Lyanna的挫败。
blocks.literary_note_zh: You see what she does to me是责任转移，随后I should not have hit her又短暂承认主体责任；两种说法在同一段摇摆。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Your Grace,” Ned Stark said, “we must talk . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard试图把谈话拉回必须处理的事情。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard没有安慰性认可Robert的自怜，而想转向治理问题，显示私人友情与Hand duty的冲突。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Robert pressed his fingertips against his temples. “I am sick unto death of talk. On the morrow I’m going to the kingswood to hunt. Whatever you have to say can wait until I return.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert厌倦谈话，决定次日去kingswood狩猎，要求余事等回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: hunt是Robert一贯的逃避出口：面对无法用身体击败的问题，他离开talk与rule。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “If the gods are good, I shall not be here on your return. You commanded me to return to Winterfell, remember?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard提醒Robert曾命他返回Winterfell，希望届时已离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert在悔意、自怜与逃避间摇摆，拒谈Targaryen girl，却强迫Eddard重新担任Hand治理王国。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: Robert stood up, grasping one of the bedposts to steady himself. “The gods are seldom good, Ned. Here, this is yours.” He pulled the heavy silver hand clasp from a pocket in the lining of his cloak and tossed it on the bed. “Like it or not, you are my Hand, damn you. I forbid you to leave.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert归还silver Hand clasp，禁止Eddard离开并强令他继续任职。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 归还badge看似恢复信任，实际以king command取消Eddard选择；职位成为强制责任而非荣誉奖赏。
blocks.background_zh: **Hand badge：** 银制手形别针象征Hand office；Eddard辞职时交还，Robert现在以王命归还并禁止其离城。

blocks.original_text: Ned picked up the silver clasp. He was being given no choice, it seemed. His leg throbbed, and he felt as helpless as a child. “The Targaryen girl—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard因伤感到无力，只能拿起徽章，并再次提Targaryen girl。
blocks.literary_note_zh: helpless as a child把Hand的银徽与splinted leg并置：形式权力恢复，身体和政治自主却都受限。
blocks.background_zh: **Targaryen girl：** Daenerys在Dothraki sea怀孕；Robert已批准刺杀计划，Eddard正因反对此事辞职。

blocks.original_text: The king groaned. “Seven hells, don’t start with her again. That’s done, I’ll hear no more of it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert拒绝再谈，称此事已经决定。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert在悔意、自怜与逃避间摇摆，拒谈Targaryen girl，却强迫Eddard重新担任Hand治理王国。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Why would you want me as your Hand, if you refuse to listen to my counsel?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard反问若不听counsel，为何还要自己做Hand。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 这句抓住全章治理悖论：Robert要Eddard承担rule，却保留不听counsel的最终权力。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。

blocks.original_text: “Why?” Robert laughed. “Why not? Someone has to rule this damnable kingdom. Put on the badge, Ned. It suits you. And if you ever throw it in my face again, I swear to you, I’ll pin the damned thing on Jaime Lannister.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert说总得有人治理王国，并以把徽章给Jaime作威胁，逼Eddard接受。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Someone has to rule承认Robert本人不愿治理；用Jaime威胁则把国家职位降格为逼迫朋友的工具。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Tower of Joy创伤记忆、王室内部权力、street violence问责与Hand责任。
